headlines.title: Iran may have used Chinese missile to shoot down U.S. fighter jet, sources say
headlines.description: The F-15 fighter that was shot down over southwestern Iran last month and set off a dangerous rescue mission was probably struck by a Chinese-made shoulder-launched missile, sources say.

headlines.title: Trump is stalling deal talks with ‘excessive demands,’ Iran official says
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has yet to make a decision on a deal that could extend the current ceasefire with Iran, with no announcement on Friday following a Situation Room meeting where he said he would make a “final determination.”Oil prices have dipped this week amid persistent reports that Trump and Iran could be close to sealing an agreement that has eluded the two sides for over a month

headlines.title: How three governor candidates highlight White House experience but rarely mention Biden
headlines.description: A trio of former Biden White House officials running for governor in 2026 are striking a delicate balance, pointing to their experience in the administration without leaning too aggressively into their connection to a former president still facing a raft of bad headlines

headlines.title: ICE eyes selling mega-warehouses purchased for mass detention
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Trump administration is looking into selling some of the large warehouses that Immigration and Customs Enforcement had purchased earlier this year to serve as mega-detention centers for immigrants, according to two Department of Homeland Security officials

headlines.title: Four more men rescued from flooded cave after becoming trapped while searching for gold
headlines.description: Five men have now been freed after spending more than a week trapped in a flooded cave in Laos, according to rescuers, with two others still missing

headlines.title: A CIA officer’s alleged heist, and a buffalo’s uncanny likeness to a famous American: The news quiz
headlines.description: Another incumbent is defeated in a primary, the pope releases his first encyclical, and the New York Knicks turn back the clock.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: 3 climbers who fell near treacherous pass on Alaska’s Mount McKinley are dead; 1 rescued
headlines.description: Three climbers on Alaska’s Mount McKinley who fell near a treacherous pass on North America’s tallest peak have died, a Latvian mountaineering group announced Friday.

headlines.title: Utility companies want to pay you to generate power for the electrical grid
headlines.description: The Wrights turned their Texas home from a solar-powered standalone into part of a Virtual Power Plant (VPP) network, which returns excess energy to the grid.

headlines.title: Truck carrying returning refugees crashes in eastern Afghanistan, killing 22
headlines.description: KABUL, Afghanistan — A truck carrying Afghan refugees returning from neighboring Pakistan overturned on a highway in eastern Afghanistan on Saturday, killing at least 22 people and injuring about 36 others, most of them women and children, officials said

headlines.title: Spain is legalizing half a million immigrants, a very different policy from the U.S.
headlines.description: BARCELONA, Spain — Nariola Romo, 34, and her family immigrated to Spain from Colombia, but that wasn’t their initial plan.

headlines.title: Trump is stalling deal talks with ‘excessive demands,’ Iran official says
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has yet to make a decision on a deal that could extend the current ceasefire with Iran, with no announcement on Friday following a Situation Room meeting where he said he would make a “final determination.”Oil prices have dipped this week amid persistent reports that Trump and Iran could be close to sealing an agreement that has eluded the two sides for over a month
